reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención en la oficina de atencion al socio, ventajas del ACA si sos socio y tenes el seguro de ellos. A veces un poco lento en la carga de combustible

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service at the member services office; ACA benefits if you're a member and have their insurance. Fueling can sometimes be a bit slow.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURDdWVQSUN3EAE

reviews.comment:
Lo tengo muy cerca y la atención es rápida cada tanto sacan promociones con los bancos para ahorrar unos pesos.

(Translated by Google)
It's very close to me and the service is fast; every now and then they have promotions with the banks to save a few pesos.
